form.formComment: Comes off a 29 day let-up. Last run pulled up at Uttoxeter on March 14 over 4700m. Race before finished second of 15 runners at Ascot on February 14 over 3900m, a neck behind Fiercely Proud carrying 68kg at $8.50. Forgive that run and he is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-13.5). Comes off a 29 day let-up. Last run pulled up at Uttoxeter on March 14 over 4700m. Race before finished second of 15 runners at Ascot on February 14 over 3900m, a neck behind Fiercely Proud carrying 68kg at $8.50. Forgive that run and he is among the better hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made a mistake jumping the second last hurdle.

form.formComment: Resumes after six months. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Aintree October 26 over 4950m. When resuming last campaign ran last in a small field at Windsor December 15 2024 over 3200m, 47 len behind Vincenzo carrying 67.5kg at $26. What happened last time is not ideal so unlikely to feature.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Freshened for 29 days. Last outing finished sixth of 13 starters at Kempton Park on March 14 over 4200m, 6 len behind Intosomethinggood carrying 70kg at $19. Before that ran on from midfield; finished fifth of 13 starters at Southwell All Weather on February 20 over 2400m, 14 len behind Constitution Hill with 60kg at $34. Appeals as an each-way hope on best figures.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Freshened for 42 days. First-up after four months pulled up at Huntingdon on March 1 over 4000m. Previously second-up finished sixth of 9 runners at Exeter on November 17 over 3800m, 23 len behind U Cant Be Serious with 76kg at $6. Looking elsewhere.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up favourite; won by 3 len Taunton on February 26 over 3800m defeating Fountains Blenhein carrying 68.5kg at $2.40 in a hurdle. Second-up favourite; won by 0.8 len Taunton on March 24 over 3800m defeating Siam Park with 74kg at $2.80 in a hurdle. Expected to improve further and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 37 days. First-up after five months finished third of 9 starters at Exeter on March 6 over 3800m, 8 len behind Genois with 68.5kg at $12. Previously second-up finished sixth of 10 runners at Ascot on November 22 2024 over 4800m, 43 len behind Law Of Supply with 66kg at $23. Improvement in store.
